# Existing DTx
Kathleen Carroll - CBT4CBT

reSET and reSET-O
https://www.c4tbh.org/meet-our-team/lisa-marsch-phd

CHESS Health
https://www.chess.health/



# Grant
core outcomes
https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9543602/

UG3/UH3 mechanism
https://grants.nih.gov/grants/guide/pa-files/PAR-25-383.html  



# Literature

https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/34859519/
